description: Formbyte appears to provide an AI-related service hosted at formbyte.ai. Its publicly discoverable integration surface is a remote Model Context Protocol server with OAuth/OpenID Connect authorization metadata.
summary: Formbyte exposes a remote MCP server at `https://formbyte.ai/mcp`, with OAuth 2.0/OIDC-based authentication discovered via standard well-known metadata; no separate public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found.
